x-enumeration-literals.name: Cash Redemption Payment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
he redeemed value is paid out as cash.

Delivered via bank transfer, ATM withdrawal, or over-the-counter.

Comment:
Example: €50 cashback transferred to a bank account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Account Credit Redemption Payment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The value is credited directly to an account linked to the product.

Reduces balance or increases available funds.

Comment:
Example: Cashback credited to a current account or card balance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Statement Credit Redemption Payment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The redemption is applied as a credit against outstanding balances.

Common in credit cards to reduce dues.

Comment:
Example: €30 applied to reduce the monthly statement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Voucher Redemption Payment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Voucher / Coupon Redemption Payment: The value is delivered as a voucher, coupon, or gift card.

Redeemable at specific merchants or platforms.

Comment:
Example: €25 retail gift card.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Goods Fulfillment Redemption Payment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are delivered as physical products.

Requires logistics and delivery handling.

Comment:
Example: Electronics, merchandise, or gifts shipped to the customer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Service Fulfillment Redemption Payment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The value is provided as a service or experience.

Comment:
Example: Travel booking, subscription, or event access.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Digital Wallet Redemption Payment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The redeemed value is transferred to a digital wallet or e-money account.

Comment:
Example: Funds sent to a mobile wallet for spending.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Third-Party Redemption Payment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Payment is made to a designated third party on behalf of the customer.

Comment:
Example: Paying a bill, loan installment, or merchant directly.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Points Transfer Redemption Payment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are transferred to another loyalty or partner program instead of cashing out.

Comment:
Example: Converting bank points to airline miles.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Hybrid Redemption Payment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A combination of multiple payment forms.

Comment:
Example: Part cash + part voucher.
